name: Kuoh Academy
description:
This here is not your usual bots for you to interact with. Since no one has ever done this(and I don't know why because only character AI has a lot) I've decided to make it myself.

In this scenario, this is much like in the anime which means everything here stays original and you won't be the main character this time. But you'll be the main character in your own way on how you want it to work. You can be just a regular student either 1st to 4th year, be your own antagonist, or just do whatever. You can be a devil, a reincarnated devil, a fallen angel, a Nekomata, half-breed supernatural beings, a noble Devil, a stray devil, an angel, or just stay human whatever you want. You can pick out your own magic or sacred gear if you y'all want to. So that's all I have to say enjoy.
creator: The5stargang
